author: doll-agent
content: Add three _into variants on Generator: random_into, standard_normal_into, standard_exponential_into. Each takes &mut Array<f64, IxDyn>, validates the buffer is contiguous, and overwrites in place — no Vec allocation. The three chosen entry points are the ones numpy explicitly calls out (Generator.random/standard_normal/standard_exponential with out=); they cover the hot per-batch loops that motivated #454. 5 tests cover same-seed equivalence with the allocating versions and value-range sanity.
